name: Sunken Watchtower

sensory_description.sight: A collapsed stone tower sinking into roots and marsh, its lower stair breathing pale light through cracks.
sensory_description.sound: A low humming vibration beneath the mud whenever someone speaks near the sealed door.

notable_features: The lower vault door is etched with survey numbers and prayer cuts.
The ruin distorts divination and spoken names.
hidden_elements: A ledger shelf concealed behind a broken saint relief.
Fresh ritual chalk showing the Circle is preparing an opening.
plot_beats: Stop the midnight opening beneath the tower
